<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [Versio.[nl|eu|uk]](https://www.versio.nl/domeinnamen) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/versio/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "versio"
  dnsCredentials:
    # VERSIO_PASSWORD: Basic authentication password
    password: ""
    # VERSIO_USERNAME: Basic authentication username
    username: ""
    # VERSIO_ENDPOINT: The endpoint URL of the API Server
    endpoint: ""
    # VERSIO_HTTP_TIMEOUT: API request timeout in seconds (Default: 30)
    httpTimeout: ""
    # VERSIO_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 5)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # VERSIO_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 60)
    propagationTimeout: ""
    # VERSIO_SEQUENCE_INTERVAL: Time between sequential requests in seconds (Default: 60)
    sequenceInterval: ""
    # VERSIO_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 300)
    ttl: ""
```

You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
Credentials may also be supplied directly as system environment variables, in which case `dnsCredentials` can be omitted.
